summary.zh: 插件作者向导技能。在对话里输入 /author-plugin 触发,手把手带不会 TypeScript 的玩家在大约 10 分钟内做出第一个能被 forgeax-server 加载的插件:一个过 schema 的 forgeax-plugin.json、一个最小可运行的 hello tool,以及一份把插件热加载进去的 reload + 验证脚本。每一步都明确说明改哪个文件、改成什么、怎么知道改对了。
summary.en: The plugin-author guide skill. Type /author-plugin in chat and it walks a non-TypeScript user, in about ten minutes, to their first server-loadable plugin: a schema-valid forgeax-plugin.json, a minimal runnable hello tool, and a reload-and-verify step that hot-loads it. Every step states which file to edit, what to write, and how to know it worked.

body.zh:
/author-plugin 触发的引导式技能
10 分钟产出可加载插件 + hello tool
面向非工程师玩家
body.en:
Skill triggered by /author-plugin
~10 min to a loadable plugin + hello tool
For non-engineer users

body.zh: 有效 forgeax-plugin.json + 最小 hello tool + reload 验证
body.en: A valid forgeax-plugin.json + minimal hello tool + reload/verify

notes.zh: 首版:四条 authoring path 之一
notes.en: First release: one of the four authoring paths
